scripts.format: biome check --write src package.json vite.config.ts tsconfig.json index.html src-tauri/tauri.conf.json src-tauri/capabilities/default.json
scripts.format:check: biome format src package.json vite.config.ts tsconfig.json index.html src-tauri/tauri.conf.json src-tauri/capabilities/default.json
scripts.lint: biome lint src package.json vite.config.ts tsconfig.json index.html src-tauri/tauri.conf.json src-tauri/capabilities/default.json --error-on-warnings
